queries.query: Scan the codebase and migrate ideas into Arc
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; explicit scan + migrate verbs.

queries.query: We're starting to use Arc — consolidate existing ideas
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; adoption-time consolidation.

queries.query: Check if there's scattered roadmap content
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; scattered-content discovery.

queries.query: We just installed Arc — pull in whatever product stuff is already in the repo
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'just installed Arc' + 'pull in' is adoption-time assess.

queries.query: Round up the TODOs and feature lists scattered across the docs folder
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'round up scattered' is assess intent.

queries.query: Sweep the project for product-direction notes and bring them into the backlog
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'sweep the project' is adjacent to scan-and-migrate.

queries.query: Import scattered feature requests from README and docs/ into Arc artifacts
queries.rationale: Assess surface — explicit import from scattered sources into Arc.

queries.query: Run a one-time migration pass now that we're adopting Arc
queries.rationale: Assess surface — one-time periodic migration.

queries.query: Look for roadmap, customer, and vision content elsewhere in the repo
queries.rationale: Assess surface — CUSTOMER/VISION/ROADMAP discovery.

queries.query: Bootstrap BACKLOG and VISION from existing project content
queries.rationale: Assess surface — BACKLOG + VISION scaffolding from existing sources.

queries.query: Record this new idea
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-capture (Appendix A); single-idea capture, not migration sweep.

queries.query: Update the README
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-sync (Appendix A); README management.

queries.query: Audit the backlog for stale items
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-audit; diagnostic sweep, not content migration.

queries.query: Capture a single new idea I just thought of
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-capture; single entry, not consolidation.

queries.query: Shape the top three captured ideas into briefs
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-shape; refinement, not discovery.

queries.query: Plan the next wave with shaped ideas
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-wave; forward planning.

queries.query: What's the current pipeline status?
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-status; read-only pulse.

queries.query: Scaffold a README from the Arc artifacts
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-sync; README scaffolding despite 'scaffold' verb.

queries.query: Scan the codebase for SQL-injection vulnerabilities
queries.rationale: Out-of-domain; security scanning, not product-content discovery.

queries.query: Migrate the database to a new schema
queries.rationale: Out-of-domain; database migration, not arc content migration.
